name: Chili Sauce (Sugar Free)
recipeIngredient: 3 quarts Tomatoes; peeled and chopped (about 18 medium)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large sauce pot.
2. Bring to a simmer, stirring occasionally until the mixture thickens and reaches desired consistency (about 3 to 4 hours).
3. Once reached the desired thickness, ladle hot sauce into hot jars, leaving 1/4 inch headspace.
4. Seal the jars tightly.
5. Process sealed jars in a boiling water bath for 15 minutes. This yields approximately 6 half-pint jars.
Note: Each tablespoon of this chili sauce contains about 6 calories.
